trade.summary: Moderate trade with complementary commodity profiles. Brazil exports soybeans, cotton, and iron ore to Thailand. Thailand exports electronics, automotive parts, rubber, and processed foods to Brazil.

diplomatic.summary: Normal diplomatic relations without significant political tension. Both countries cooperate in agricultural trade. Thailand is a fellow emerging market. Limited high-level engagement.

military.summary: No military cooperation. Very limited defense ties.

financial.summary: Very limited bilateral investment. Some Thai agribusiness companies have explored Brazilian market. Brazilian agribusiness firms export to Thailand.

energy.summary: Very limited energy trade. Some biofuel trade. Both are producers of sugarcane ethanol.

scientific.summary: Very limited scientific cooperation. Some exchange in agricultural and food sciences. Growing interest in sustainable aquaculture research.
